SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC, REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HENERY ERNESTO LOPEZ RODRIQUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIQUEZ, HENERY ERNESTO LOPEZ $1,741.44 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,841.44 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
